title: Dock Sprint
subtitle: Time Attack / Shadow Moses entry route
objective: Reach the extraction marker as fast as possible while keeping combat noise low.
briefing: A compact VR version of Mission 001. Route memory matters more than firepower.

rewards.description: Unlocks a route-memory tape when you clear with FOX rank or better.

title: Ghost Dock
subtitle: No Alert infiltration drill
objective: Complete the route with zero full alerts and no lethal takedowns.
briefing: This drill rewards patience: slow movement, crouch timing, and clean line-of-sight breaks.

rewards.description: Unlocks a no-alert after-action tape when you reach FOXHOUND or better.

title: SOCOM Range
subtitle: Weapon training / accuracy evaluation
objective: Neutralize target drones with controlled fire and avoid wasting ammunition.
briefing: Suppressed fire is not magic. Every shot should have a purpose.
restrictions: CQC does not count toward weapon objective

rewards.description: Unlocks a weapon discipline tape when the result reaches FOX rank or better.

title: Quiet CQC
subtitle: Non-lethal close quarters drill
objective: Clear the corridor using non-lethal takedowns and minimal gunfire.
briefing: CQC is useful when distance collapses, but it is risky if another guard has sightline.

rewards.description: Adds a local VR badge for clean non-lethal doctrine.

title: Chaff Breaker
subtitle: Camera and searchlight disruption drill
objective: Disable surveillance windows with chaff and cross the yard without full compromise.
briefing: Electronics can be disrupted, not defeated forever. Timing matters.

rewards.description: Adds a local VR badge for surveillance disruption.

title: Armored Captain Duel
subtitle: Boss challenge / shield pressure test
objective: Defeat the Armored Guard Captain with limited damage and disciplined fire.
briefing: A boss drill built from Mission 001. Read the pattern, preserve distance, and do not panic-fire.

rewards.description: Unlocks the boss duel replay tape when you reach FOX rank or better.

title: FAMAS Moving Line
subtitle: Weapon Mode / MOVE-B tracking drill
objective: Destroy all eight MOVE-B targets while controlling automatic fire.
briefing: MOVE-B targets stay mobile. Lead each target and use short FAMAS bursts instead of emptying the magazine.

rewards.description: Recognizes disciplined burst control against moving VR targets.

title: PSG1 Precision Grid
subtitle: Weapon Mode / long-range CUBE-B drill
objective: Destroy six distant CUBE-B targets with minimal PSG1 ammunition.
briefing: CUBE-B targets remain fixed, making this a pure test of sight alignment, timing and shot economy.

rewards.description: Recognizes economical long-range fire against fixed VR targets.

title: CUBE-R Chain
subtitle: Weapon Mode / grenade blast drill
objective: Clear six explosive CUBE-R targets with controlled grenade chain reactions.
briefing: CUBE-R targets can trigger nearby red targets. Maintain blast distance and choose the first detonation carefully.

rewards.description: Recognizes safe use of explosive target chain reactions.

title: C4 Wall Breach
subtitle: Weapon Mode / destructible WALL drill
objective: Plant C4 and destroy five WALL obstructions to open the goal route.
briefing: WALL targets are destructible obstacles. Place each charge, withdraw beyond the blast and detonate deliberately.

rewards.description: Recognizes clean C4 placement against destructible VR walls.

title: KOKESHI-B Mine Lane
subtitle: Weapon Mode / Claymore interception drill
objective: Use Claymores to intercept six moving KOKESHI-B targets.
briefing: KOKESHI-B is the dedicated Claymore-training target. Read its route before committing each directional mine.

rewards.description: Recognizes correct Claymore placement against KOKESHI-B targets.

title: Stinger UFO Hunt
subtitle: Weapon Mode / airborne explosive target drill
objective: Acquire clean Stinger locks and destroy four moving UFO targets.
briefing: UFO is a large moving explosive target designed for Stinger practice. Keep clear of overlapping blast zones.

rewards.description: Recognizes efficient Stinger locks against airborne VR targets.

title: Nikita Red Route
subtitle: Weapon Mode / guided MOVE-R drill
objective: Guide Nikita missiles through the route and destroy six explosive MOVE-R targets.
briefing: MOVE-R targets move and detonate. Steer around cover, break the correct cluster and keep Snake outside the blast.

rewards.description: Recognizes controlled Nikita routing against MOVE-R targets.

title: KOKESHI-G Unarmed
subtitle: Special Mode / bare-handed moving-target drill
objective: Neutralize six moving KOKESHI-G targets using bare-handed combat only.
briefing: KOKESHI-G is reserved for unarmed training. Close distance, commit to each strike and do not fire.

rewards.description: Recognizes a clean bare-handed KOKESHI-G clear.
